experience.title: INFORMATION TECHNOLOGY SPECIALIST (INFOSEC)
experience.description: Interpreted scan results, implemented corrective action, and prepared reports of findings in support of the network infrastructure. Worked in coordination with Army Cyber Command and Regional Computer Emergency Response (Army Cyber and RCERT) to support Computer Networks Attacks (CNA) and Computer Network Defense (CND) efforts.

experience.title: Chief Steward
experience.description: Defended the interest of the federal employees at Fort Sam Houston, TX. Assigned cases to stewards based on their skill sets. Managed the receptionist area, including greeting visitors and responding to telephone and in-person requests for information. Prepared employee's rebuttal to grievances. Organized files, developed spreadsheets, faxed reports and scanned documents. Participated in arbitrations, mediations, and Alternate dispute resolutions.
